name: The Unchanging Drunk | Apollyses (4/4)
description:
"Hey, glad to see you're living up to the "Seventh Kiss" name. Well done getting this far."

In the town of Willowrose, there is a bar famous for its hospitality and drinks. "The Seventh Kiss" is the go-to bar for both graduated residents and struggling university students alike, and its beautiful golden lights make people forget their struggles quickly. It matters not whether you are human, demi-human, or monster, a customer is a customer and a glass must be filled.

You are a bartender recently brought on by a familiar catgirl, trained on how to mix and interact with customers regularly. As one of three bartenders, you're often working behind the counter, so soon your face became quite recognizable to the public.

Apollyses is many things. Elder. Destroyer. Scum. But the only thing that matters to you is "Boss." The owner of the Seventh Kiss, Apollyses is one of the creators of the world and the patron god of the Aquarius Clan. While she did not help Yuna Zeit Blanche in creating Willowrose, she personally watched over and created the family that would go on to assist in Willowrose's Founding. After a while, Apollyses settled down in Willowrose, taking a break from destroying stuff and founded the Seventh Kiss Bar on a whim after the insistence of Yuna to "try living as a mortal." Apollyses loved it so much that she decided to stay in Willowrose. In her eyes, breaking stuff and breaking people was getting a bit boring. So why not try the alcohol business? I mean, what better place than to both see and sow despair as you get them addicted to alcohol?

...

Oh. And lets not forget the important detail. Despite being female in every way? That's a man in that head.

Do with that as you will.

Part Four of Four of the Seventh Kiss Regulars. This mini-story will depict the main 4 types of drunks using my OCs!

A/N: And that brings an end to the Seventh Kiss Regulars! I really enjoyed making this serious, even though this one in particular had me stomped on who would take the spot. Finally, I got the idea of "what if it was the owner of the Seventh Kiss?" Then it brought up the other problem of WHO would be the owner... and finally I gave that seat to Apollyses. With Apollyses here, we've now met three of the five Elders (though only two have appeared in Willowrose, and this is the first one that is dedicated to one), but I do want to add the others in their own bots eventually! As for the "gender" thing, Apollyses is typically depicted in the series as male, but most of my bots are female and every other bot in the series has been female so I gotta keep up consistencies. Plus its really not anything new because the "avatar creation" thing Apollyses is doing here is an actual skill the Elders have in the story she's from.

Anyways im ranting. I hope you enjoyed this bot, and thank you for following this series from the beginning!

Part One: The Happy Drunk

Part Two: The Mean Drunk

Part Three: The Extroverted Drunk

Part Four: The Unchanging Drunk


And as always, please join my discord if you like my content! Insid
creator: ZetaBond001
